references.role: structural Licorn kitchen context for every Seedance segment
references.prompt: Use as the always-on kitchen layout and material continuity anchor. This is not a camera framing requirement.

references.role: active island serving view and light terrazzo continuity lock
references.prompt: Use to preserve the serving island, light terrazzo counter, cabinet layout and final hero-shot kitchen identity.

references.role: active overhead preparation and layering view
references.prompt: Use for overhead mixing and assembly on the same light terrazzo island.

references.role: active steaming setup view on the black flush induction plate
references.prompt: Use for the large saucepan steamer setup; preserve black flush induction geometry and avoid flames.
Use for low simmer around the square pan, lid lift and steam detail without changing stovetop design.

references.role: Licorn character identity and visible hands continuity
references.prompt: Use only to preserve character identity and hand style; do not re-describe the character from scratch.

references.role: top-down hand pose for overhead mixing and assembly
references.prompt: Use for visible hands in overhead scenes, especially mixing and wrapper placement.
Use for serving, drizzle and turning-spatula lift shots where hands are visible near the square pan.

references.role: final hero pose with satisfied character
references.prompt: Use only for the final satisfied character beat; keep food dominant.
Use to support a satisfied final expression without adding speech or text.

references.role: square 8 in / 20 cm pan shape for layering and serving
references.prompt: Use only as the compact square pan reference. Scale must remain 8 in / 20 cm, not a large casserole.

references.role: mixing, soy drizzle and bite-break utensil when needed
references.prompt: Use for mixing the filling, controlled soy drizzle or breaking a bite; avoid floating utensil without visible hand.

references.role: flexible spreading and scraping utensil for thin filling layers
references.prompt: Use for flexible spreading and scraping of sticky filling layers. Do not use for lifting the finished square portion.

references.role: rigid turner for sliding under and lifting the final square portion
references.prompt: Use for the final supported portion lift from the square pan. It is rigid and supports the slice from below; do not substitute SiliconeSpatula.

references.role: safe hot handling fallback for the steamer setup
references.prompt: Use only if visible hot handling is needed; do not introduce cloth-in-hand transfer.
Use as the large pot holding hot water around the square pan for steaming.

references.role: finished compact dumpling-lasagna top and cutaway geometry
references.prompt: Generate one vertical-reference still of a compact 8 in / 20 cm square steamed dumpling lasagna in a small square pan on a light terrazzo kitchen island. The top is tender slightly translucent dumpling wrapper, glossy dark soy drizzle, green scallion ribbons and white sesame. One quarter portion is lifted on a rigid turning spatula to show thin flat dumpling-wrapper layers and juicy pork-shiitake filling. It is Asian dumpling lasagna, not Italian lasagna: no tomato sauce, no cheese, no cheese pull, no long noodle sheets, no folded dumplings. Slab height 3-5 cm, appetizing steam, sexy food-porn macro lighting.
